mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stat_daily_customer_sales (enterprise_id, stat_date, customer_id, customer_name, order_count, sum_amount) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.customerName}, #{item.orderCount}, #{item.sumAmount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE customer_name = VALUES(customer_name), order_count = VALUES(order_count), sum_amount = VALUES(sum_amount), updated_at = NOW()
